# Summary Statistics

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(kableExtra)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

summary_stats <- read_csv("../Data/summary_stats.csv")
summary_stats %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Value = round(Value, 2)) %>%
  kable(caption = "Summary Statistics of Dataset", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position"))

model1 <- read_csv("../Data/model1_ols_avg_deviation.csv")
model1 %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3)) %>%
  kable(caption = "OLS Model 1: Average Deviation Predicting Box Office", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position"))
model2 <- read_csv("../Data/model2_ols_all_beats.csv")
model2 %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3)) %>%
  kable(caption = "OLS Model 2: All Beat Deviations Predicting Box Office", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position"))
rf_importance <- read_csv("../Data/rf_feature_importance.csv")
rf_importance %>%
  rename(
    `Importance (%IncMSE)` = IncMSE,
    `Importance (%)` = ImportancePct
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Importance (%IncMSE)` = round(`Importance (%IncMSE)`, 3),
    `Importance (%)` = round(`Importance (%)`, 2)
  ) %>%
  kable(caption = "Random Forest Feature Importance", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position"))
```
